description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a short-sleeved, patterned shirt and fitted pants. The individual has a full beard and wears a head covering, possibly a turban or wrapped cloth, along with sunglasses. His arms are extended horizontally, and his build is robust with visible muscle definition in the arms. The shirt is loose-fitting, while the pants are more form-fitting and tucked into ankle-high footwear. The overall appearance suggests a confident, streetwise pedestrian, suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A robust adult male in casual urban clothing, with a head covering, sunglasses, and fitted pants tucked into ankle-high shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, sunglasses, head covering, and the patterned shirt with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head covering, beard, and the fit of the pants and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head covering, the shirt's pattern, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg details.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved casual shirt and fitted pants with ankle-high shoes, head covering, and sunglasses
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by wrapped head covering
